productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex Holdall CB Blue Duffle Bag
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this copiously spacious duffle bag. Inspired by the retro style of the 70s and 80s, this colourful bag makes for a great addition to your travel bag collection.Made of 100% algodon on the outer with a 100% polyester inner liningOne main zippered compartment with two organiser sleeves on the insideBranding in distressed print on the front and backWide handles made of synthetic twill tapeHas synthetic leather detailing on the outerCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
